# meok-cra-art14-reporter-mcp

> MEOK CRA Article 14 Reporter MCP — actively-exploited-vulnerability notification with 24h/72h/14d clocks. ENISA + national CSIRT payload generator. 11 Sept 2026 cliff. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- classify_vulnerability
- open_vulnerability_case
- generate_enisa_payload
- check_clock_status
- list_national_csirts
- check_cra_status
- sign_chain

## Install
```
pip install meok-cra-art14-reporter-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-cra-art14-reporter-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
